mapper.select: select payment_number, fee_id, payment_amount, payment_date, payment_method, bank_account, transaction_number, payer_account, payee_account, payment_status, payment_remark, refund_amount, refund_date, refund_remark, create_time, update_time from t_env_fee_payments where fee_id = #{feeId}

select payment_number, fee_id, payment_amount, payment_date, payment_method, bank_account, transaction_number, payer_account, payee_account, payment_status, payment_remark, refund_amount, refund_date, refund_remark, create_time, update_time from t_env_fee_payments where payment_number = #{paymentNumber}
select count(*) from t_env_fee_payments where payment_number = #{paymentNumber}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_env_fee_payments
payment_number, fee_id, payment_amount, payment_date, payment_method, bank_account, transaction_number, payer_account, payee_account, payment_status, payment_remark,
#{paymentNumber}, #{feeId}, #{paymentAmount}, #{paymentDate}, #{paymentMethod}, #{bankAccount}, #{transactionNumber}, #{payerAccount}, #{payeeAccount}, #{paymentStatus}, #{paymentRemark},
